---
title: "From Script to Software (todo)"
---

{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_gradethis.qmd >}}

::: {.callout-note}
**Proposed chapter scope:** Practical software engineering for researchers: writing R packages, code style and organisation, version control with git, and distribution via containers (Docker). Aimed at researchers who want to share reproducible workflows or move beyond one-off scripts.
:::
